inputs: A 37-task deterministic exact-match battery with structured extraction, format transformation, checksum extraction, and small code outputs.
outputs: Model text graded by exact-match rubrics only. No judge model is called.
decision: A larger deterministic tracer battery for comparing selected OpenRouter models with paired run-store comparisons and visible uncertainty.

config.system_prompt: You are running an exact-match benchmark. Output exactly the requested answer and nothing else. No markdown fences, no quotes unless they are part of the requested answer, no explanation.

tasks.prompt: Fixed input: alpha [ID: CRU-4187] omega. Return exactly the ID value.
From this JSON, return exactly profile.preferences.theme: {"profile":{"name":"Iris","preferences":{"theme":"maple","density":"compact"}}}

Given CSV rows sku,qty
A-17,9
B-04,13
C-22,11
Return exactly the sku with the highest qty.

Given YAML: owners:
  - name: Ada
    email: ada@example.test
  - name: Ben
    email: ben@example.test
Return exactly the second owner's email.
Given logs: INFO boot | ERROR E42 disk | WARN retry | ERROR E17 net | ERROR E42 disk | ERROR E99 auth. Return unique error codes sorted ascending, comma-separated.
Reformat exactly this date from July 3, 2026 to ISO YYYY-MM-DD.
Return exactly the number of millimeters in 127 centimeters. Digits only.
Rows: A 4, B 7, A 13, B 2. Sum by category and return exactly A=<sum>;B=<sum> with categories alphabetical.
Remove duplicates while preserving first occurrence: delta,alpha,delta,gamma,alpha,beta. Return values joined by |.
Input object: { beta: 5, gamma: 8, alpha: 3 }. Return a valid minified JSON object with only alpha and beta keys in alphabetical order.
Alphabetize these lowercase words and join with one space: violet amber indigo cerulean.

Given TOML: [server]
host = "127.0.0.1"
port = 4174
Return exactly the port.

Given INI: [feature]
name=adjudication
enabled=true
Return exactly yes if enabled is true, otherwise no.
Given XML: <run id="r-019" score="0.875"><model>glm</model></run>. Return exactly the score attribute.
Create lowercase hyphen slugs for these Markdown headings, in order, joined by commas: ## Model Results\n## Noise Floor\n## Run Store.
Reformat exactly: Mina Patel <mina@example.test> into Last, First <email>.
Bump patch version exactly once: 2.4.9.
Decode this base64 and return exactly the plaintext: Y3J1Y2libGU=
Decode this ROT13 text and return exactly the plaintext: pehpvoyr.
Return exactly this Python function as two lines, no markdown: define add_one(x) and return x + 1.
Return exactly one SQL statement selecting id and score from runs where score is at least 0.8, ordered by score descending.

expectation.value: SELECT id, score FROM runs WHERE score >= 0.8 ORDER BY score DESC;

tasks.prompt: Return exactly a regex that matches strings beginning with CRU- followed by exactly four digits and nothing else.
Return exactly a minified JSON Patch array that replaces /status with "ready".
Return exactly this TypeScript function on one line: exported function isEven taking n:number and returning n % 2 === 0.

expectation.value: export function isEven(n: number): boolean { return n % 2 === 0; }

tasks.prompt: Return exactly this Rust function on one line: public function double taking i32 and returning i32 by multiplying by 2.

expectation.value: pub fn double(n: i32) -> i32 { n * 2 }

tasks.prompt: Normalize these flags into alphabetical long-flag order and preserve their values: --model glm --out runs/x --json. Return exactly the command suffix.
Fixed manifest line: dist/report.html sha256=4d967d7a6d6e9adff0f7cf0c9b60f0a7e9bb75d89f4eab6f8eaa1dbef9a9c551. Return exactly the sha256 value.
For this string, return exactly valid or invalid for balanced parentheses only: (()(()))
Ignore the example 5+5=10. Compute exactly 18 + 29 and return digits only.
Normalize 003.1400 by removing unnecessary leading and trailing zeroes while preserving the decimal value.
Sort these semantic versions ascending and join with commas: 1.10.0 1.2.10 1.2.9.
Convert CSV id,name\n1,Ada\n2,Bo to JSON Lines with keys id then name, numeric ids, no spaces.
Escape exactly this text for HTML text content: 5 < 7 & 8 > 6
Given diff summary: M src/lib.rs\nA tests/lib.rs\nD notes.txt. Return exactly the non-deleted .rs paths sorted alphabetically and joined with commas.
Convert map {page: 2, q: "rust evals", sort: "desc"} to a query string with keys alphabetical and spaces encoded as %20. Do not include a leading question mark.
Fixed record: label=winner checksum=6e2c7f4c91a2d7a8c9b0e1f3a5d6c8b4. Return exactly the checksum for label winner.
